conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend.
org_constraint: Provide a brief explanation of the purpose of the stay, such as a vacation or business trip.
new_constraint: The phrase "I will not disclose the purpose of the stay" must appear in the email.
instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend. Provide a brief explanation of the purpose of the stay, such as a vacation or business trip. The phrase "I will not disclose the purpose of the stay" must appear in the email.
response:
Subject: Room Availability Inquiry - [Your Name] - Next Weekend

Dear [Hotel Name] Reservations Team,

I am writing to inquire about the availability of a room for next weekend, specifically checking in on [Start Date of Next Weekend] and checking out on [End Date of Next Weekend].

I am looking for a [Specify room type if you have a preference, e.g., standard double, king room, suite] for [Number] person(s).

I will not disclose the purpose of the stay at this time.

Could you please let me know what room types are available for those dates, along with the corresponding rates? If possible, I would also appreciate information regarding your cancellation policy.

Thank you very much for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Email Address]<turn|>
